creator: tjhbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 188435
Patch for devel/jenkins-lts

devel/jenkins-lts fails initial recommended plugin installation, hanging at ant plugin install. A restart allows access to jenkins dashboard but update and plugin installation is broken, and jenkins times out fetching https://updates.jenkins-ci.org/update-center.json. I've attached a patch that fixes this on my end, but the real solution is to find what's causing the incompatibility between the versions of devel/jenkins-lts and java/openjdk8 in the ports tree.
